responsibilities.rationale: Historical src/eval/capability-retrieval-report.ts retrieval responsibility is transferred to fixtures/compat/retrieval/capability-cases-expanded.v1.json with deterministic Rust equivalence and exact/BM25 evidence.

Historical src/eval/provider-conformance.ts authority is replaced by `cargo run -p minimax-compat-harness --locked -- provider-eval --format json`, the exact Rust evaluator test, and fixtures/compat/evaluations/provider-report.expected.json.
Unshipped live-Provider smoke src/smoke/provider-smoke.ts is intentionally retired; supported conformance is deterministic and offline.
